author: lOrm
content: Fixed in worktree: replaced O(N) pop()-loop with single Vec::truncate(saturating_sub) in src/tui/messages.rs::pop_last. Added test pop_last_handles_saturating_and_zero_edges covering count == 0 (no-op) and count > len (saturates without panic). cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features clean (-D warnings); new test passes.
